heading: Authorities of Secretary of State with respect to Convention
label: 5603 Authorities of Secretary of State with respect to Convention
notes: Amendments2016—Pars. (2), (3). substituted “Commission consistent with the procedures detailed in Articles XIV and XV of the Convention” for “Fisheries Commission”.Pub. L. 114–327
amendments: Amendments2016—Pars. (2), (3). substituted “Commission consistent with the procedures detailed in Articles XIV and XV of the Convention” for “Fisheries Commission”.Pub. L. 114–327

children.text: receive and transmit reports, requests, recommendations, proposals, and other communications of and to the Organization and its subsidiary organs;
object, or withdraw an objection, to the proposal of the Commission consistent with the procedures detailed in Articles XIV and XV of the Convention;
give or withdraw notice of intent not to be bound by a measure of the Commission consistent with the procedures detailed in Articles XIV and XV of the Convention;
object or withdraw an objection to an amendment to the Convention; and
act upon, or refer to any other appropriate authority, any other communication referred to in paragraph (1).
